title: Questions from Quarantine: Life Post-COVID 2021 and Beyond
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine. _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The Security and Global Health Project hosts a weekly web series featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, who address public inquiries submitted with the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. The series, titled 'Questions from Quarantine: Life Post-COVID 2021 and Beyond,' aims to provide guidance on maintaining mental and physical well-being during the ongoing global health crisis. It represents an initiative to disseminate expert advice directly to the public, fostering engagement and information sharing on topics related to pandemic response and recovery. The content is part of a broader effort to explore long-term implications and strategies for life after the pandemic, connecting immediate public health concerns with broader security and policy discussions.
result.main_content_zh: 安全与全球健康项目推出每周网络系列节目，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持，旨在回答公众通过#QuestionsFromQuarantine标签提交的疑问。该系列名为“隔离期的问题：2021年及后疫情时代的生活”，致力于在全球健康危机期间为公众提供保持心理和生理健康的指导。这是一个向公众直接传播专家建议的倡议，旨在促进关于疫情应对和恢复相关话题的参与和信息共享。该内容是探索疫情后长期影响和战略的更广泛努力的一部分，将直接的公共卫生关切与更广泛的安全和政策讨论联系起来。
